title: Terracotta slip wash on air-dry clay
notes: Applying a thin wash of terracotta-coloured acrylic paint diluted with water over bone-dry air-dry clay to simulate a fired terracotta finish. The wash sinks into the texture and gives a warm red-brown colour that reads as earthenware. Applied with a mop brush, excess wiped back with a damp cloth. PVA over the top for seal. A quick finish technique for pots and planters.
